description_long: This coupe car features a boxy, vintage-inspired design with a mustard yellow exterior and a blacked-out front grille. The car has four doors, each with a distinct window, and the side mirrors are mounted on the doors. The wheels are simple, with white hubcaps and black tires, and the rear of the car includes rectangular taillights and a subtle bumper. The roofline is straight and flat, giving the car a classic notchback profile. The windows are tinted dark, and there are small louvered vents on the rear side panels. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian yet stylish vehicle suitable for urban environments.
description: A mustard yellow, four-door coupe car with a boxy, vintage design, black grille, and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Rear view showing rectangular taillights, a subtle bumper, and the flat trunk area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, three side windows, and louvered rear vents.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the blacked-out grille, rectangular headlights, and flat hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible doors, windows, and rear vents.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with three side windows per side
